fields.helpText: This field contains a Planning Criteria for VA Facilities (H-08-9) Chapter title.
This field contains the three digit Planning Criteria for VA Facilities (H-08-9) code.

fields.setOfCodes: BU:BED UNITS;OP:OUTPATIENT TREATMENT;CS:CLINICAL SUPPORT SERVICES;NC:NATIONAL CEMETERY SYSTEM;VB:VETERANS BENEFITS ADMINISTRATION;
fields.helpText: This field is a set of codes based on the Planning Criteria for VA Facilities (H-08-9) groupings.
This field is a set of codes (1 for inactive, 0 for active) to indicate whether or not an H-08-9 has been made obsolete.
This field contains a comma delimited list of facility types. (Examples: VHA,VBA,NCS  or VBA,NCS etc)
